title: Privacy budget for personalized recommendations
prompt: A platform chooses a single differential-privacy budget for a recommendation pipeline. The model treats recommendation accuracy as increasing and privacy protection as decreasing in that budget; it contains no user churn or regulatory penalty. Explain the privacy-utility trade-off without adding those outcomes.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize modeled recommendation utility minus privacy-loss cost
model_specification.mechanism: A larger privacy budget reduces added noise but weakens the modeled privacy guarantee.

fidelity_requirements: No churn or legal penalty term
prohibited_inferences: The selected budget ensures regulatory compliance
